title: [LTL][SVA] Proposal for Explicit Clocking in the CIRCT LTL(SVA) Intermediate Representation

features.name: concurrent assert property with explicit posedge clock and chained cycle delays
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assert property statement that specifies an explicit posedge clocking event in the property expression and chains multiple ##N cycle delay operators across boolean signal expressions
features.snippet:
logic clk, e, f, a;
assert property(@(posedge clk) e ##[1:5] f ##1 a);

features.name: named sequence declaration with internal explicit clocking event
features.description: Code should include a named sequence declaration that embeds an explicit posedge clocking event as its leading clock, combined with a range cycle delay operator inside the sequence body

features.name: SVA range-form cycle delay operator in sequence
features.description: Code should include an SVA sequence expression using the range-form cycle delay operator ##[n:m] to specify a bounded consecutive repetition delay between two boolean signal operands

features.name: assert property instantiating a named sequence with clock trapping
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement that instantiates a previously declared named sequence and appends an additional ##N cycle delay to a boolean signal, exercising the clock-trapping rule where the clock from the named sequence does not propagate to the appended delay
